title: Nutella Swirl Pound Cake
instructions:
Lightly grease and flour a 9 x 5 loaf pan and set aside.
In a small bowl whisk the eggs and the vanilla together.
In a medium bowl combine the flour and the baking powder.
In a large bowl beat the butter and the sugar together with an electric mixer until fluffy. With the mixer on a low speed blend in the egg mixture.
With the mixer on a low speed add the flour mixture in small batches until well blended. Mix for 30 seconds more.
Spread 1/3 of the batter in the prepared pan, then ½ of the Nutella on top.
Add another 1/3 of the batter on top of the Nutella and then the remaining ½ of of the Nutella on top of the batter just added.
Top with the remaining batter and lightly swirl the batter with a dinner knife. **Be careful not to over mix.**
Bake the cake for 1 hour and 15 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Let the cake cool for 15 minutes and then invert onto a baking rack, turn right side up and cool completely.
Enjoy!
(original recipe can be found on Delish.com)
